patch_description: The error "No EVOLVE-BLOCK regions found in original content" indicates that the "Incorrect Program to Fix" section was completely empty - there's literally no code to fix. The evaluation system is looking for a file that doesn't exist. Since there's no original content with EVOLVE-BLOCK markers to preserve, I need to create a minimal working program that will at least run and provide basic functionality. I'll create a simple baseline heuristic that can serve as a starting point.
error_msg: No EVOLVE-BLOCK regions found in original content
